name: iOS New Chat State Consistency
description: Tests state consistency after New Chat on iOS: navigate to Chat tab → verify initial state → tap New Chat button → verify chat tab shows a functional state (empty state or conversation area hint cards) → navigate to Models tab and back → verify state remains consistent. Validates that New Chat does not leave the UI in a broken or indeterminate state.

steps.description: Verify app launched with tab bar visible.
Wait for chat interface to appear.
Verify chat tab shows a functional initial state.
Tap the New Chat button if present (may not exist in empty state or without a model).
Wait for UI to settle after New Chat action.
Verify chat tab still shows a functional state after New Chat (not broken or blank).
Navigate to Models tab to test round-trip consistency.
Wait for Models tab to render.
Navigate back to Chat tab to verify persistence.
Wait for chat interface to re-render.
Verify chat tab state is consistent after round-trip navigation post New Chat.
